Dense Article Test

I saw a dog. She has a dog. They found a dog. He likes a dog. We want a dog.

A dog ran fast. A dog sat down. A dog barked loud. A dog was here. A dog is cute.

There was a table. She bought a table. He made a table. They need a table. I see a table.

A table was set. A table is round. A table looks nice. A table was moved. A table is wood.

The house is big. The house is old. The house is red. The house is here. The house is nice.

The book is new. The book is good. The book is long. The book is mine. The book is open.

The city is vast. The city is near. The city is safe. The city is warm. The city is home.
